title: S33R More Parrots
description: Adds 3 new variants for each color of parrot.
body:
This pack requires Optifine or an Optifine like mod (surprise surprise).

I made a parrot pack for all the bird lovers yippee :D

I'm not sure why this idea skipped my mind when I made the Mob Variety pack but this pack adds some funny new textures for all the parrots yay :>

Renaming one of the 5 colors of parrots with a nametag labeled "Default", "Gem", "Mystic", or "Avian" will assign it one of the 4 designs per color based on the labels in this project Gallery.

Have fun with yassified parrots o/

~ Seer

![Empyr3 Banner](https://64.media.tumblr.com/c6a3c82db08f552caea6fbc335408cd2/dc0014a2e7c8630e-c1/s2048x3072/bfd1ffa937d23bbd937521255b701c2d4066dcea.pnj)
